description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a dense row of mature trees, creating a private and secluded atmosphere. The structure features a flat roof with multiple levels and dark-colored solar panels, complemented by a mix of dark and natural wood exterior cladding. The front yard is landscaped with green lawns, paved walkways, and small garden beds, while the rear and sides are enclosed by the tree line. Large windows and sliding glass doors are visible, allowing for ample natural light and a strong indoor-outdoor connection. The property includes a driveway and a small patio area, enhancing its residential appeal. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with dark and wood exterior finishes, surrounded by dense trees and landscaped gardens. Large windows and a private driveway highlight its contemporary residential style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped yard, and a clear view of the flat roof and solar panels.
description_view_1: Side view with the tree line curving around the property, partially obscuring the building and revealing the driveway and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the dense row of trees, with the back of the bungalow mostly hidden and only the upper roof visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the tree enclosure and more of the garden and patio spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
